learning: I believe in Reading, Comparing, and Observing. I dive deep into documentation, connect new concepts with existing knowledge like solving a puzzle, and enhance my understanding by watching how experienced developers use tools and technologies. This multi-faceted approach helps me not just learn syntax, but understand the 'why' behind technical decisions.
goalsIntro: As a Software Engineer pursuing a Master's in Data Analytics, I'm focused on the intersection of software engineering and data science:
goals: Mastering data visualization and analytics tools (Tableau, BigQuery, R)
Deepening machine learning expertise with PyTorch and TensorFlow
Building full-stack applications with React and Next.js
Preparing for Azure Developer Associate (AZ-204) certification
Contributing to open-source projects in data engineering
